languages.text: "Магос Ханейманн, именем Омниссии я призываю тебя принять мою помощь в акте экстракции чужеродных механизмов". {n}Тревога вибрирует вокруг Эоганна полем гальванической статики, заставляя волоски на тыльной стороне ваших ладоней топорщиться.{/n} "Я смогу избыть скверну, и твое служение не прервется, если позволишь мне..."

"Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."
languages.original_text: "Магос Ханейманн, именем Омниссии я призываю тебя принять мою помощь в акте экстракции чужеродных механизмов". {n}Тревога вибрирует вокруг Эоганна полем гальванической статики, заставляя волоски на тыльной стороне ваших ладоней топорщиться.{/n} "Я смогу избыть скверну, и твое служение не прервется, если позволишь мне..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the taint without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

"Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the taint without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

"Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

languages.text: «Magos Haneumann, en nombre del Omnissiah, le imploro que acepte mi ayuda en el acto de extraer los mecanismos alienígenas». {n}Los nervios fluyen en torno a Eogunn en un campo de estática que hace que los pelos de tus manos se ericen.{/n} «Puedo purgar la corrupción sin interrumpir su servicio, si me lo permite...».
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: «Magos Haneumann, en nombre del Omnissiah, le imploro que acepte mi ayuda en el acto de extraer los mecanismos alienígenas». {n}Los nervios fluyen en torno a Eogunn en un campo de estática que hace que los pelos de tus manos se ericen.{/n} «Puedo purgar la corrupción sin interrumpir su servicio, si me lo permite...».

languages.text: “哈努曼贤者，以欧姆尼赛亚之名，我恳求你接受我的协助，替你移除那些异形机械装置。”{n}焦躁仿佛化作一团静电，在伊奥贡周围嗡鸣，令你手背上的汗毛都竖了起来。{/n}“只要你允许，我可以净化那腐化，而不影响你的侍奉……”
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: “哈努曼贤者，以欧姆尼赛亚之名，我恳求你接受我的协助，替你移除那些异形机械装置。”{n}焦躁仿佛化作一团静电，在伊奥贡周围嗡鸣，令你手背上的汗毛都竖了起来。{/n}“只要你允许，我可以净化那腐化，而不影响你的侍奉……”

languages.text: "Magos Haneumann, im Namen des Omnissiah, flehe ich Euch an, meine Hilfe bei der Extrahierung der außerirdischen Mechanismen zu akzeptieren." {n}Eogunn ist von einem galvanischen Feld aus Angst umgeben, das dir die Haare zu Berge stehen lässt.{/n} "Ich kann die Verderbnis reinigen, ohne Euren Dienst zu unterbrechen, wenn Ihr mir nur gestattet ..."
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Haneumann, im Namen des Omnissiah, flehe ich Euch an, meine Hilfe bei der Extrahierung der außerirdischen Mechanismen zu akzeptieren." {n}Eogunn ist von einem galvanischen Feld aus Angst umgeben, das dir die Haare zu Berge stehen lässt.{/n} "Ich kann die Verderbnis reinigen, ohne Euren Dienst zu unterbrechen, wenn Ihr mir nur gestattet ..."

languages.text: « Magos Haneumann, au nom de l'Omnimessie, je vous conjure d'accepter mon assistance dans l'opération d'extraction des mécanismes étrangers. » {n}L'anxiété d'Eogunn se diffuse autour de lui sous la forme d'un champ d'interférences galvaniques qui fait se dresser les poils de vos mains.{/n} « Avec votre consentement, je peux expurger la corruption sans pour autant nuire à votre capacité à servir... »
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: « Magos Haneumann, au nom de l'Omnimessie, je vous conjure d'accepter mon assistance dans l'opération d'extraction des mécanismes étrangers. » {n}L'anxiété d'Eogunn se diffuse autour de lui sous la forme d'un champ d'interférences galvaniques qui fait se dresser les poils de vos mains.{/n} « Avec votre consentement, je peux expurger la corruption sans pour autant nuire à votre capacité à servir... »

languages.text: "Magos Haneumann, Hermesih adına uzaylı mekanizmalarını çıkarma işleminde yardımı kabul etmeniz için yalvarıyorum." {n}Bir galvaniz statik alanı içinde Eogunn'u saran endişe, ellerindeki tüyleri diken diken ediyor.{/n} "Sadece izin verirseniz hizmetinizi kesintiye uğratmadan yozlaşmayı arındırabilirim..."
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Haneumann, Hermesih adına uzaylı mekanizmalarını çıkarma işleminde yardımı kabul etmeniz için yalvarıyorum." {n}Bir galvaniz statik alanı içinde Eogunn'u saran endişe, ellerindeki tüyleri diken diken ediyor.{/n} "Sadece izin verirseniz hizmetinizi kesintiye uğratmadan yozlaşmayı arındırabilirim..."

languages.text: 「マゴス・ハネウマン、オムニシアの御名において、私は異星人の機械を抽出する行為において、私の援助を受け入れるよう懇願します。」{n}「エオグンは電磁静電場の広がる野原で不安に震えている。あなたの手に触れると、毛が逆立つ。」{/n}「私はあなたの奉仕を中断することなく、腐敗を浄化することができます。もしあなたが許せば…」
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, in the name of the Omnissiah, I implore you to accept my assistance in the act of extracting the alien mechanisms." {n}Anxiety hums around Eogunn in a field of galvanic static, making the hairs on your hands stand up.{/n} "I can purge the corruption without interrupting your service, if only you allow me..."

traits.locale_text: 「マゴス・ハネウマン、オムニシアの御名において、私は異星人の機械を抽出する行為において、私の援助を受け入れるよう懇願します。」{n}「エオグンは電磁静電場の広がる野原で不安に震えている。あなたの手に触れると、毛が逆立つ。」{/n}「私はあなたの奉仕を中断することなく、腐敗を浄化することができます。もしあなたが許せば…」
